heading: Definition of student with a print disability
label: 1140k Definition of student with a print disability
text: In this subpart, the term “student with a print disability” means a student with a disability who experiences barriers to accessing instructional material in nonspecialized formats, including an individual described in .section 121(d)(2) of title 17
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was amended by , , , and no longer defines blind or other persons with disabilities. However, , as amended, does define “eligible person” to include blind persons, persons with visual impairment or perceptual or reading disability, and persons with other physical disabilities that inhibit reading skills.Section 121(d) of title 17Pub.
